Surname.jp: 他国の人見知りな死霊術師

description.en: Attacks 2 enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>65%</color> chance to reduce the targets' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>65%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>65%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>65%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks <color=#28d9ed>2</color> enemies and, with a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance, removes <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> from the targets.\nIf the target has a <color=#28d9ed>persistent</color> effect, the attack cannot miss and decreases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2</color> turns.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.\n대상이 지속성이라면 빗나감이 발생하지 않으며 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵<color=#28d9ed>2体</color>にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1</color>個解除する。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>持続性</color>の場合、攻撃はミスせず、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2</color>ターンの間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击<color=#28d9ed>2</color>名敌人,并以<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的概率移除目标<color=#28d9ed>1</color>个<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。\n若目标为<color=#28d9ed>持续性</color>效果,则攻击不会未命中,并在<color=#28d9ed>2</color>回合内降低<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>。

description.en: Attacks 2 enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>, and reduced <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nAdditionally, has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unhealable</color> on Earth targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>과 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 감소시킵니다.\n추가로 지속성 대상에게는 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>회복 불가</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>と<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nまた、対象が地属性の場合、<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>回復不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>和<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n并有<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率对土属性目标造成<color=#28d9ed>无法恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
